ownership.purpose: submit orchestration and guarded post-validation delivery defaults
notes: The submit path owns commit, push, and optional post-push delivery stages.
The project itself still owns real CI, release, and notification integrations.
Automatic submit queueing applies to technical-delivery routes unless a runtime guard blocks it.
Non-code delivery stays out of the submit path unless the user explicitly asks for governed delivery.
submit_policy=manual suppresses automatic queueing only; explicit commit/push requests still use governed submit.
启用条件：enabled=true 且 command 非空。
command 在 push 成功后执行，适合发 IM/邮件/Webhook 通知。
如需本地阶段产物，优先写到 .codex/aide/artifacts/delivery/，避免后续 submit inspect 把它当成待提交改动。
启用条件：enabled=true 且 command 非空。
command 在 push 成功且 notify 未阻断时执行，适合触发项目 CI 或做轻量校验。
默认推荐保持 report-first，先接可观测命令，再决定是否做更强自动化。
如需本地阶段产物，优先写到 .codex/aide/artifacts/delivery/，避免后续 submit inspect 把它当成待提交改动。
启用条件：enabled=true 且 command 非空。
command 在 push 成功且前置 post-push 阶段未阻断时执行，适合发布登记、制品提升或部署触发。
默认不建议直接接高风险发布动作，除非项目自己确认了回滚和审批边界。
如需本地阶段产物，优先写到 .codex/aide/artifacts/delivery/，避免后续 submit inspect 把它当成待提交改动。
